'''ngowalaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:rubbable|rubbable]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-w-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rubbable|rubbable]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ngowalaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngowalithi|ngowalithi]] || [[word:ngowaliji|ngowaliji]] || [[word:ngowalishi|ngowalishi]] || [[word:ngowaliki|ngowaliki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngowaluthuthu|ngowaluthuthu]] || [[word:ngowalujuju|ngowalujuju]] || [[word:ngowalushushu|ngowalushushu]] || [[word:ngowalukuku|ngowalukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngowaluthu|ngowaluthu]] || [[word:ngowaluju|ngowaluju]] || [[word:ngowalushu|ngowalushu]] || [[word:ngowaluku|ngowaluku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngowalufthuf|ngowalufthuf]] || [[word:ngowalufjuf|ngowalufjuf]] || [[word:ngowalufshuf|ngowalufshuf]] || [[word:ngowalufkuf|ngowalufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngowalethe|ngowalethe]] || [[word:ngowaleje|ngowaleje]] || [[word:ngowaleshe|ngowaleshe]] || [[word:ngowaleke|ngowaleke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngowalothotho|ngowalothotho]] || [[word:ngowalojojo|ngowalojojo]] || [[word:ngowaloshosho|ngowaloshosho]] || [[word:ngowalokoko|ngowalokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngowalotho|ngowalotho]] || [[word:ngowalojo|ngowalojo]] || [[word:ngowalosho|ngowalosho]] || [[word:ngowaloko|ngowaloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngowalofthof|ngowalofthof]] || [[word:ngowalofjof|ngowalofjof]] || [[word:ngowalofshof|ngowalofshof]] || [[word:ngowalofkof|ngowalofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngowalĂŻfthĂŻf|ngowalĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngowalĂŻfjĂŻf|ngowalĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngowalĂŻfshĂŻf|ngowalĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngowalĂŻfkĂŻf|ngowalĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngowalĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|ngowalĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngowalĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|ngowalĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngowalĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|ngowalĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngowalĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|ngowalĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngowalĂŻfthĂŻf|ngowalĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngowalĂŻfjĂŻf|ngowalĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngowalĂŻfshĂŻf|ngowalĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngowalĂŻfkĂŻf|ngowalĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngowalĂŻfthĂŻf|ngowalĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngowalĂŻfjĂŻf|ngowalĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngowalĂŻfshĂŻf|ngowalĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngowalĂŻfkĂŻf|ngowalĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngowalĂŠthĂŠ|ngowalĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:ngowalĂŠjĂŠ|ngowalĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:ngowalĂŠshĂŠ|ngowalĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:ngowalĂŠkĂŠ|ngowalĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngowalathatha|ngowalathatha]] || [[word:ngowalajaja|ngowalajaja]] || [[word:ngowalashasha|ngowalashasha]] || [[word:ngowalakaka|ngowalakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngowalatha|ngowalatha]] || [[word:ngowalaja|ngowalaja]] || [[word:ngowalasha|ngowalasha]] || [[word:ngowalaka|ngowalaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngowalafthaf|ngowalafthaf]] || [[word:ngowalafjaf|ngowalafjaf]] || [[word:ngowalafshaf|ngowalafshaf]] || [[word:ngowalafkaf|ngowalafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:ngowalasha|ngowalasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngowalshĂ«asha|ngowalshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngowalroasha|ngowalroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngowalmuasha|ngowalmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngowalyaasha|ngowalyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongowalnkshĂ«asha|gongowalnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongowalnkroasha|gongowalnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongowalnkmuasha|gongowalnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongowalnkyaasha|gongowalnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:ngowawalasha|ngowawalasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngowawalshĂ«asha|ngowawalshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngowawalroasha|ngowawalroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngowawalmuasha|ngowawalmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngowawalyaasha|ngowawalyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongowawalnkshĂ«asha|gongowawalnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongowawalnkroasha|gongowawalnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongowawalnkmuasha|gongowawalnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongowawalnkyaasha|gongowawalnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:ngewĂŠlasha|ngewĂŠlasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngewĂŠlshĂ«asha|ngewĂŠlshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngewĂŠlroasha|ngewĂŠlroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngewĂŠlmuasha|ngewĂŠlmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngewĂŠlyaasha|ngewĂŠlyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongewĂŠlnkshĂ«asha|gongewĂŠlnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongewĂŠlnkroasha|gongewĂŠlnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongewĂŠlnkmuasha|gongewĂŠlnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongewĂŠlnkyaasha|gongewĂŠlnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:ngowfalasha|ngowfalasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngowfalshĂ«asha|ngowfalshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngowfalroasha|ngowfalroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngowfalmuasha|ngowfalmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngowfalyaasha|ngowfalyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongowfalnkshĂ«asha|gongowfalnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongowfalnkroasha|gongowfalnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongowfalnkmuasha|gongowfalnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongowfalnkyaasha|gongowfalnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
